specs.name: Battlecraft
specs.description: A master of arms who turns discipline and technique into his greatest strength. Every blow is calculated to break the enemy defense, exploit their weak points, and set up a devastating finisher. His combat is precise, methodical, and lethal, rewarding those who master the rhythm of battle.

mastery.name: Master Armorer
mastery.description: While wielding a two-handed weapon, all damage you deal is increased by 10%.

specs.name: Bloodrush
specs.description: A berserker who fights with a weapon in each hand and lets rage drive his every move. The longer he fights, the greater his Enrage, unleashing a relentless storm of attacks that gives his enemies no respite. A frenzied, savage, aggressive style where the offensive never stops. Committing to Bloodrush unlocks dual wielding, and through Titan's Grip even a two-handed weapon in each hand, though wielding two-handers in both hands reduces physical damage dealt by 12%.

mastery.name: Bloodletter
mastery.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 5% and attack power by 10.

specs.name: Ironguard
specs.description: The guardian who leads the front line with shield raised and unbreakable will. He withstands the assault of countless foes, protects his allies, and controls the battlefield with authority. He turns every blocked blow into a chance to answer with force.

mastery.name: Recompense
mastery.description: Increases all threat you generate by 30% and your armor by 10%. Vanguard: your Stamina is increased by 40% and you gain armor equal to 70% of your Strength.

options.name: Double Charge
options.description: Your Charge stores 2 uses, so you can charge twice in a row.

options.name: Pursuit
options.description: Each enemy you kill grants 30% movement speed for 6 sec.

options.name: Crushing Charge
options.description: Your Charge also roots the target for 4 sec and slows it by 50% for 15 sec.

options.name: Second Wind
options.description: Below 35% health, you regenerate 1.5% of your health per second.

options.name: Die by the Sword
options.description: Defensive cooldown: for 8 sec you take 30% less damage and dodge far more attacks.

options.name: Victory Rush
options.description: Grants Victory Rush: after killing an enemy, your next strike heals you for 20% of your maximum health.

options.name: Piercing Howl
options.description: A shout that slows enemies within 15 yards by 50% for 8 sec.

options.name: Storm Bolt
options.description: Hurl your weapon to stun a target.

options.name: Lingering Dread
options.description: Enemies feared by your Intimidating Shout can endure 20% of their health in damage before the fear breaks.

options.name: Anger Management
options.description: Your auto-attacks generate 10% more rage and your abilities 5% more.

options.name: Combat Mastery
options.description: Your stances gain additional effects. Battle Stance: your ability criticals deal 15% more damage. Berserker Stance: your auto-attacks are 5% faster. Guarded Stance: a hit that would take at least 20% of your maximum health deals 15% less damage.

options.name: Battle Rhythm
options.description: Every third ability you use generates 20% more rage.

options.name: Recklessness
options.description: Enrage: increase all your rage generation by 50% and gain 20% additional critical strike chance for 12 sec.

options.name: Avatar
options.description: Transform into a colossus for 20 sec, breaking all control on you and increasing your damage dealt by 20%.

options.name: Bloodbath
options.description: Each enemy you kill grants 5% critical strike and 5% damage dealt for 8 sec, stacking up to 25%.

options.name: Colossal Might
options.description: Each point of Rage you spend shaves 0.1 sec off the cooldown of your major offensive abilities, up to 10 sec every 30 sec.

options.name: Bladestorm
options.description: Become a whirling storm of steel, striking all enemies within 8 yards every second for 4 sec.

options.name: Sanguine Aura
options.description: Imbue your weapon with the blood of your foes. You and your melee allies gain 10% attack speed and 10% damage for 20 sec.

specs.name: Sacrament
specs.description: A devoted healer who turns the Light into steady single-target recovery.

mastery.name: Kindled Faith
mastery.description: Your healing spells critically heal for double.

specs.name: Vigil
specs.description: A shield-bearing defender who converts Holy power into threat and mitigation.

mastery.name: Oathward
mastery.description: Increases all threat you generate by 50% and your armor by 20%.

specs.name: Requital
specs.description: A holy warrior who judges enemies with weapon strikes and radiant burst.

mastery.name: Blood Debt
mastery.description: Increases your Holy and physical ability damage by 20%.

rows.decision: Verdict-fed mana vs mobile Mending Light vs Verdict-Rite resets

options.name: Oath Returned
options.description: Verdict restores 25 mana when cast.

options.name: Pilgrim's Light
options.description: Mending Light is castable while moving.

options.name: Ashen Sentence
options.description: Rite of Expulsion deals 25% more damage, costs 25% less, and Verdict resets its cooldown.

rows.decision: ally dispel vs banked stuns vs Holy Ground lockdown

options.name: Cleansing Verdict
options.description: Grants Cleansing Verdict: purge a harmful magic effect off an ally and heal them.

options.name: Twin Gavels
options.description: Sundering Gavel stores 2 uses.

options.name: Hallowed Snare
options.description: Holy Ground also roots enemies within 8 yd for 2 sec.

rows.decision: healing cadence vs shield-to-emergency reset vs critical-heal wards

options.name: Third Benediction
options.description: Every 3rd Mending Light or Lightmend makes your next Mending Light within 10 sec instant.

options.name: Mercy from Ruin
options.description: When Ward of Faith is fully consumed, it shaves 120 sec off Last Rite's cooldown.

options.name: Afterglow Aegis
options.description: Critical heals from Mending Light, Lightmend, and Last Rite also ward the target, absorbing 60 damage for 10 sec.

rows.decision: faster Verdicts vs area holy burst vs Oathbrand-fed Verdict tempo

options.name: Swift Verdicts
options.description: Verdict's cooldown is reduced by 20%.

options.name: Saint's Ire
options.description: Grants Saint's Ire.

options.name: Oathwheel
options.description: Landed melee attacks while your Oathbrand is active shave 0.5 sec off the cooldown of Verdict.

rows.decision: personal bulwark vs ally emergency ward vs cheat death

options.name: Lightward
options.description: Grants Lightward.

options.name: Rite's Afterglow
options.description: Last Rite also wraps its target in a sacred ward absorbing 360 damage for 10 sec.

options.name: Deathless Ardor
options.description: A blow that would kill you leaves you at 1 health instead. Once every 180 sec.

rows.decision: self empowerment vs ranged execute vs silencing shield ricochet

options.name: Wrathwing
options.description: Grants Wrathwing.

options.name: Tolling Hammer
options.description: Grants Tolling Hammer.

options.name: Dawnward Ricochet
options.description: Grants Dawnward Ricochet.

specs.name: Packlord
specs.description: A wild commander who fights beside a durable companion.

mastery.name: Packbond
mastery.description: Your pet deals 35% more damage. Increases maximum health by 8%.

specs.name: Coldsight
specs.description: A precise archer built around ranged burst and efficient shots.

mastery.name: Iron Aim
mastery.description: Increases your ranged ability damage by 20% and critical strike chance by 3%.

specs.name: Fieldcraft
specs.description: A skirmisher who controls distance and survives close pressure.

mastery.name: Quickblood
mastery.description: Increases your Agility by 15% and your dodge chance by 4%.

rows.decision: venom damage vs banked Fell Shots vs stronger Guises

options.name: Deepvenom
options.description: Venom Barb's poison deals 20% more damage.

options.name: Twin Fletching
options.description: Fell Shot stores 2 uses.

options.name: Guisecraft
options.description: Harrier's Guise and Marten's Guise effects are 25% stronger.

rows.decision: ranged disorient vs ground root vs frequent rooting shot

options.name: Startle Shot
options.description: Grants Startle Shot: a ranged disorient that breaks on any damage.

options.name: Rime Snare
options.description: Grants Rime Snare.

options.name: Pinning Barb
options.description: Rattling Shot's slow deepens to 70% for its 4 sec duration.

rows.decision: pet sustain vs shot-fed mana vs reactive self-shield

options.name: Patch Up
options.description: Patch Up heals a living pet for 50% more.

options.name: Lean Quiver
options.description: Every 3rd ranged shot restores 20 mana.

options.name: Deathless Will
options.description: Taking a hit for at least 30% of your maximum health grants 40% movement speed for 4 sec. 30 sec internal cooldown.

rows.decision: area shot vs faster Long Draw vs venom rider

options.name: Splitshot
options.description: Grants Splitshot.

options.name: Steady Draw
options.description: Long Draw's cast time is reduced by 20%.

options.name: Viperfletch
options.description: Fell Shot also envenoms the target for 50% of its damage over 3 sec, ticking every 1 sec.

rows.decision: active avoidance vs pet damage sharing vs hardy constitution

options.name: Bristleguard
options.description: Grants Bristleguard.

options.name: Bloodbond
options.description: While your pet is alive, 20% of damage you take is redirected to it.

options.name: Fieldhardy
options.description: Increases your maximum health by 10%.

rows.decision: steadfast Arrowfall vs shot-fed burst uptime vs party attack rally

options.name: Steady Rain
options.description: Arrowfall deals 50% more damage, and taking damage cannot shorten its channel.

options.name: Redline Draw
options.description: Every 3rd ranged shot reduces Fevered Draw's cooldown by 5 sec, at most once every 8 sec.

options.name: Wildfang Rally
options.description: Grants Wildfang Rally.

specs.name: Knifework
specs.description: A burst specialist using critical strikes and finishers.

mastery.name: Redhanded
mastery.description: Increases Craven Thrust's critical strike chance by 30% and your poison damage by 10%.

specs.name: Thuggery
specs.description: A sustained fighter focused on direct weapon strikes.

mastery.name: Scrapper's Edge
mastery.description: Increases attack speed by 10%, and your auto-attacks have a 5% chance to trigger an extra attack.

specs.name: Skulduggery
specs.description: A stealth attacker built around openers, control, and avoidance.

mastery.name: False Face
mastery.description: Increases the damage of your critical strikes by 25%, and you move 50% faster while in Duskveil.

rows.decision: Wicked Slash cadence vs Craven Thrust weave vs opener energy

options.name: Ceaseless Cuts
options.description: Every 3rd Wicked Slash restores 30 energy.

options.name: Knife's Dividend
options.description: Craven Thrust makes your next Dirt Nap within 6 sec cost 50% less energy.

options.name: Dusk Dividend
options.description: Using Lurker's Strike or Throat Wire restores 20 energy.

rows.decision: evasive smoke vs Eye Jab follow-up vs Low Blow energy refund

options.name: Smoke Screen
options.description: Grants Smoke Screen: a cloud that raises your dodge by 30% for 8 sec.

options.name: Blindside Opening
options.description: Eye Jab makes your next Craven Thrust within 6 sec free.

options.name: Paid in Pain
options.description: Low Blow restores 15 energy when used.

rows.decision: full cooldown reset vs stored escape charges vs builder-fed free tempo

options.name: Contingency
options.description: Grants Contingency.

options.name: Second Exit
options.description: Swift Heels and Ghostfoot each store 2 uses.

options.name: Borrowed Tempo
options.description: Every 3rd builder makes your next Cutthroat Tempo within 8 sec free.

rows.decision: two-finisher builder discount vs evasive strike vs poison-fed energy

options.name: Final Notice
options.description: Each Dirt Nap or Bleed Out makes your next builder within 8 sec cost 50% less energy.

options.name: Wraith Strike
options.description: Grants Wraith Strike.

options.name: Venom Dividend
options.description: Landed melee auto-attacks with an active poison have a 20% chance to restore 10 energy.

rows.decision: spell defense vs Ghostfoot burst energy vs lethal-hit insurance

options.name: Shadecloak
options.description: Grants Shadecloak.

options.name: Ghostfoot Gambit
options.description: Ghostfoot restores 30 energy and makes your next builder within 8 sec cost 50% less energy.

options.name: Borrowed Breath
options.description: A blow that would kill you leaves you at 1 health instead. Once every 120 sec.

rows.decision: target teleport vs finisher-fed haste cooldown vs opener-fed finisher discount

options.name: Shadeslip
options.description: Grants Shadeslip.

options.name: Redline Habit
options.description: Each finisher reduces Quickened Blood's cooldown by 6 sec.

options.name: First Cut, Last Word
options.description: Each opener makes your next finisher within 6 sec cost 50% less energy.

specs.name: Doctrine
specs.description: A mitigator who shields allies and heals through controlled efficiency.

mastery.name: Fixed Purpose
mastery.description: Your shields absorb 30% more. Increases maximum health by 8%.

specs.name: Benison
specs.description: A direct healer with strong throughput and restorative prayers.

mastery.name: Grave Mercy
mastery.description: Increases all healing you do by 20%.

specs.name: Vespers
specs.description: A damage caster built around Shadow damage over time and mind spells.

mastery.name: Gloamveil
mastery.description: Increases your damage-over-time damage by 15% and your spell damage by 10%.

rows.decision: Scouring Hymn cadence vs prayer-cadence ward vs Dirge-gated Mindfracture damage

options.name: Warding Refrain
options.description: Every 3rd Whispered Prayer hardens its target into a ward absorbing 40 damage for 10 sec.

options.name: Third Verse
options.description: Every 3rd Scouring Hymn makes your next mana-cost healing spell within 8 sec free.

options.name: Dirgebound Thought
options.description: Mindfracture deals 25% more damage to targets afflicted by your Dirge of Decay.

rows.decision: single-target silence vs area fear vs consumed-shield heal

options.name: Shattered Psalm
options.description: When your Psalm of Warding is fully consumed, it bursts, healing its owner for 45.

options.name: Hushword
options.description: Grants Hushword.

options.name: Terror Canticle
options.description: Grants Terror Canticle.

rows.decision: on-demand free cast vs healing-cadence discount vs Mindfracture leech

options.name: Stilled Mind
options.description: Grants Stilled Mind.

options.name: Measured Mercy
options.description: Every 3rd mana-cost healing spell makes your next mana-cost healing spell within 10 sec cost 50% less.

options.name: Gloam Siphon
options.description: Mindfracture also afflicts the target for 30 damage over 3 sec, ticking every 1 sec and healing you for 100% of it.

rows.decision: banked Mindfractures vs emergency heal echo vs extended decay

options.name: Twin Fracture
options.description: Mindfracture stores 2 uses.

options.name: Mercy Deferred
options.description: Solemn Prayer leaves an echo for 10 sec: if the target falls below 35% health, they are instantly healed for 60.

options.name: Endless Dirge
options.description: Each Litany of Woe tick extends your Dirge of Decay on the target by 1 sec, up to 6 added sec.

rows.decision: instant self-heal vs stronger party fortitude vs reactive ward

options.name: Last Prayer
options.description: Grants Last Prayer.

options.name: Resolve Unbroken
options.description: Litany of Resolve effect increased by 50%, granting your party 7.5% Stamina instead of 5%.

options.name: Wounded Halo
options.description: Taking a hit for at least 15% of your maximum health kindles a ward absorbing 15% of your maximum health for 10 sec. 20 sec internal cooldown.

rows.decision: party healing vs area shadow damage vs critical-heal wards

options.name: Choirmend
options.description: Grants Choirmend.

options.name: Thoughtburn
options.description: Grants Thoughtburn.

options.name: Halo Aftershock
options.description: Critical heals from Whispered Prayer, Solemn Prayer, Urgent Prayer, Sunburst Canticle, and Choirmend also ward the target, absorbing 50 damage for 10 sec.

specs.name: Thundercall
specs.description: A ranged caster who calls lightning, flame, and frost.

mastery.name: Earthen Fury
mastery.description: Increases your spell damage by 15% and your spell haste by 10%.

specs.name: Warspirit
specs.description: A weapon fighter who channels the storm through melee swings.

mastery.name: Skyrend
mastery.description: Increases your melee attack speed by 10% and your physical ability damage by 10%.

specs.name: Spiritmend
specs.description: A healer using ancestral waves and efficient nature magic.

mastery.name: Cleansing Tides
mastery.description: Your healing spells cost 20% less mana.

rows.decision: Arc Bolt-fed free jolt vs reflected-hit instant bolt vs imbued sustain

options.name: Fault Line
options.description: Every 3rd Arc Bolt makes your next Earthen Jolt, Cinder Jolt, or Rime Jolt within 8 sec free.

options.name: Rebounding Current
options.description: When your Thunder Ward reflects a strike, your next Arc Bolt within 8 sec is instant.

options.name: Imbued Lifeblood
options.description: Each landed melee auto-attack with an active weapon imbue heals you for 8.

rows.decision: interrupting Earthen Jolt vs rooting Rime Jolt vs Jolt-fed mana

options.name: Fault Rebuke
options.description: Earthen Jolt also interrupts spellcasting for a 2 sec school lockout.

options.name: Rime Lock
options.description: Rime Jolt also roots the target for 2 sec.

options.name: Returning Current
options.description: Every 3rd Jolt restores 30 mana.

rows.decision: heal-crit tempo vs bolt-crit tempo vs healing-over-time spring

options.name: Guiding Spirits
options.description: When your Mending Waters critically heals, your next Mending Waters within 10 sec is instant.

options.name: Sky Echo
options.description: Arc Bolt critical strikes make your next Arc Bolt within 8 sec instant.

options.name: Springwell
options.description: Grants Springwell.

rows.decision: area lightning vs DoT detonation vs imbued-melee Jolt cooldowns

options.name: Skybranch
options.description: Grants Skybranch.

options.name: Cinder Rupture
options.description: Earthen Jolt detonates your Cinder Jolt on the target, dealing its remaining damage instantly.

options.name: Imbued Tempo
options.description: Landed melee auto-attacks with an imbued weapon shave 0.5 sec off your Jolt cooldowns.

rows.decision: ground root vs instant travel form vs reactive absorb

options.name: Gripping Earth
options.description: Grants Gripping Earth.

options.name: Wolfstep
options.description: Shadewolf becomes instant.

options.name: Ancestral Mending
options.description: Taking a hit for at least 15% of your maximum health instantly heals you for 12% of your maximum health. 20 sec internal cooldown.

rows.decision: party haste vs crit-fed Jolt burst vs emergency healing echoes

options.name: Storm Chorus
options.description: Grants Storm Chorus.

options.name: Storm Recall
options.description: Arc Bolt critical strikes finish Earthen Jolt's cooldown and make your next Earthen Jolt within 8 sec free.

options.name: Undertow Promise
options.description: Every 3rd Mending Waters leaves an echo for 10 sec: if the target falls below 35% health, the echo heals them for 80.

specs.name: Chronomancy
specs.description: A mage who manipulates time and aether to protect allies. They can anticipate wounds, repeat healing, and reverse damage before it is too late.

mastery.name: Chronoweave
mastery.description: Increases all healing you do by 15%, your maximum mana by 5%, and your mana regeneration by 20%.

specs.name: Pyromancy
specs.description: A master of flame who chains critical strikes into devastating explosions. Fast, aggressive, and capable of igniting many enemies.

mastery.name: Ignition
mastery.description: Your spell critical strikes burn the target for 40% of the damage dealt over 6 sec, stacking. Increases critical strike chance by 2%.

specs.name: Cryomancy
specs.description: A spellcaster who controls the battlefield with ice, slows, and freezes. They build glacial power to destroy enemies with precise attacks.

mastery.name: Brittlebreak
mastery.description: Increases your Frost spell damage by 25%. Increases armor by 10%.

options.name: Ice Floes
options.description: Grants Ice Floes: your next two spells with a cast time can be cast while moving.

options.name: Double Blink
options.description: Flickerstep stores 2 charges, but each recharges 30% more slowly.

options.name: Blink While Casting
options.description: You can use Flickerstep in the middle of a cast without interrupting it.

options.name: Warded
options.description: While your personal barrier is up you take 15% less damage, and it heals its bearer for 10% of your maximum health when it breaks after absorbing.

options.name: Shifting Ward
options.description: Casting your personal barrier breaks roots affecting you.

options.name: Greater Invisibility
options.description: Grants Greater Invisibility: vanish for 20 sec, removing 2 damage-over-time effects and taking 90% less damage while invisible and shortly after.

options.name: Ring of Frost
options.description: Grants Ring of Frost: its perimeter persists for 10 sec and freezes enemies that cross it for 4 sec.

options.name: Snap Bewitch
options.description: Bewitch becomes instant, on a 20 sec cooldown.

options.name: Twin Icebind
options.description: Icebind stores 2 charges that recharge independently.

options.name: Power Echo
options.description: Grants Power Echo: your next direct spell repeats at 50% power on the same target.

options.name: Overload
options.description: Grants Overload: your next spell is amplified by 40% but costs 50% more mana.

options.name: Racing Mind
options.description: Grants Racing Mind: your next spell with a cast time is cast instantly.

options.name: Elemental Convergence
options.description: Alternating a Fire and a Frost spell opens an 8 sec surge of power, once per 30 sec.

options.name: Winter's Recall
options.description: Grants Winter's Recall: instantly finishes the cooldown of Flickerstep, Frostveil and Greater Invisibility.

options.name: Mass Barrier
options.description: Grants Mass Barrier: shield you and all allies within 30 yd.

options.name: Rune of Power
options.description: Grants Rune of Power: inscribe a rune; allies standing near it deal 10% more damage.

options.name: Overflowing Power
options.description: Spending mana shaves the cooldown of your defensives: 2 sec per tenth of your maximum mana spent, up to 10 sec every 30 sec.

options.name: Aetherwell
options.description: Grants Aetherwell: channel to restore mana, building spell power the longer you channel.

specs.name: Hexcraft
specs.description: A curse-weaver using damage over time and drains.

mastery.name: Creeping Rot
mastery.description: Your damage-over-time effects deal 20% more damage.

specs.name: Pactbound
specs.description: A durable warlock who survives through demonic resilience.

mastery.name: Fiendlore
mastery.description: 20% of damage you take is redirected to your demon. Increases Stamina by 10%.

specs.name: Ruination
specs.description: A burst caster using Gloom Bolt, fire, and Duskfire.

mastery.name: Desolation
mastery.description: Increases Ruinbolt and Gloom Bolt damage by 20%.

rows.decision: Gloom-to-Blackrot cadence vs Blackrot control vs stronger Burning Pact

options.name: Grave Rhythm
options.description: Every 3rd Gloom Bolt makes your next Blackrot within 8 sec instant.

options.name: Blacktide
options.description: Blackrot also slows its target by 30% for 6 sec.

options.name: Pact Deepened
options.description: Burning Pact deals 20% more damage.

rows.decision: magic devour vs area fear vs sustained slow

options.name: Voidfeast
options.description: Grants Voidfeast: devour a magic effect and heal yourself.

options.name: Dread Chorus
options.description: Grants Dread Chorus.

options.name: Leaden Hex
options.description: Grants Leaden Hex.

rows.decision: richer Hard Bargain vs mobile Consume vs reactive ward

options.name: Blood Credit
options.description: Hard Bargain grants 20% more mana.

options.name: Walking Hunger
options.description: Consume is channelable while moving.

options.name: Fiendward
options.description: Taking a hit for at least 15% of your maximum health binds your demon to you for 10 sec: if you fall below 35% health, it heals you for 15% of your maximum health. 20 sec internal cooldown.

rows.decision: DoT-fed bolt damage vs harder Sear vs fire-fed shadow discount

options.name: Deepened Hex
options.description: Gloom Bolt deals 20% more damage to targets afflicted by your DoTs.

options.name: Ashen Focus
options.description: Sear deals 25% more damage and costs 25% less.

options.name: Shadow Credit
options.description: Each damaging Fire spell makes your next damaging Shadow spell within 8 sec cost 50% less.

rows.decision: instant horror vs snap Harrow vs reactive self-heal

options.name: Morrowlash
options.description: Grants Morrowlash.

options.name: Snapdread
options.description: Harrow becomes instant but gains a 16 sec cooldown.

options.name: Deep Hunger
options.description: Consume deals 50% more damage.

rows.decision: direct chaos burst vs damaging-cast ward vs curse-fed instant bolt

options.name: Ruinbolt
options.description: Grants Ruinbolt.

options.name: Hellglass Ward
options.description: Every 3rd damaging Fire or Shadow spell raises a demonic ward absorbing 90 damage for 10 sec.

options.name: Hexstorm
options.description: Every 3rd Blackrot or Hex of Anguish makes your next Gloom Bolt within 8 sec instant, at most once every 10 sec.

specs.name: Moongrove
specs.description: A caster who uses lunar and nature magic from range.

mastery.name: Moonrage
mastery.description: Increases your spell damage by 15% and your spell haste by 10%.

specs.name: Wildfang
specs.description: A shapeshifter who tanks in bear form and fights up close.

mastery.name: Primal Heart
mastery.description: Increases your physical ability damage by 15%, your bleed damage by 15%, your threat by 20%, and your armor by 15%.

specs.name: Groveheart
specs.description: A healer using heal-over-time effects and efficient nature magic.

mastery.name: Grove's Gift
mastery.description: Your heal-over-time effects heal 25% more.

rows.decision: Wildbolt spell cycle vs Wolf Form opener vs Wildbloom healing payoff

options.name: Moonkindle
options.description: Every 3rd Wildbolt makes your next Lunar Tempest within 8 sec free.

options.name: Redmaw
options.description: Shifting into Wolf Form makes your next Rendclaw or Flense within 8 sec cost 50% less.

options.name: Bloom's End
options.description: When Wildbloom runs its full duration, your next Wildmend within 8 sec is instant.

rows.decision: area knockback vs root-to-spell setup vs Concuss rage and reset

options.name: Typhoon
options.description: Grants Typhoon: knock back and daze all enemies within 8 yd.

options.name: Briar Ambush
options.description: Gripping Roots makes your next Wildbolt within 8 sec instant, at most once every 15 sec.

options.name: Bruin Rebound
options.description: Concuss restores 15 rage, refunding its 10 rage cost plus 5 additional rage, and removes 20 sec from its cooldown.

rows.decision: cross-form resource waves vs shapeshift attack discount vs healing cadence ward

options.name: Lifesap
options.description: Grants Lifesap: living sap restores your current resource in waves, in any form.

options.name: Formrush
options.description: Shapeshifting makes your next form attack within 8 sec cost 50% less.

options.name: Grove Covenant
options.description: Every 3rd Wildmend shields its target, absorbing 90 damage for 10 sec.

rows.decision: feral finisher cycle vs lunar instant cast vs emergency heal echo

options.name: Redtooth Rhythm
options.description: Each Gorebite or Bloodrift makes your next Rendclaw or Flense within 8 sec cost 50% less.

options.name: Moonspite
options.description: Every 3rd Lunar Tempest makes your next Skyfall within 8 sec instant, at most once every 15 sec.

options.name: Mercy Seed
options.description: Wildmend leaves a stored heal of 60 that triggers if the target falls below 35% health within 8 sec.

rows.decision: Oakhide-fed instant spell vs active bear healing vs hit-fed rage shield

options.name: Oaken Reflex
options.description: Oakhide makes your next Wildbolt, Skyfall, Wildmend, or Second Bloom within 8 sec instant.

options.name: Savage Mending
options.description: Grants Savage Mending.

options.name: Ironhide Reflex
options.description: Taking a hit for at least 20% of your maximum health shields you, absorbing 15% of your maximum health for 6 sec. While in Bruin Form, it also restores 20 rage. 20 sec internal cooldown.

rows.decision: moonwing party crit vs feral burst vs party healing channel

options.name: Nature's Fury
options.description: While in Moonwing Form, you and your party members within 30 yd gain 3% spell critical strike chance.

options.name: Red Haze
options.description: Grants Red Haze.

options.name: Gladesong
options.description: Grants Gladesong.
